'''Aven'sai'Ulrahk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] and the [[President/Legends|President]] of [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she continued a policy of supporting the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
